---
name: Documentation issue
about: Report unclear, missing, outdated, or incorrect public documentation.
title: "[Docs]: "
---

## Documentation page or repository

Link or name of the page/repository:

---

## Issue type

- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Unclear wording
- [ ] Missing explanation
- [ ] Formatting issue
- [ ] Typo
- [ ] Other

---

## What should be improved?

Describe the documentation issue.

---

## Suggested change

Suggest the wording or structure that would make this clearer.

---

## Public-safe confirmation

- [ ] This issue does not include private customer data.
- [ ] This issue does not include credentials, tokens, or secrets.
- [ ] This issue does not include personal shipping addresses.
